entity.summary: Protocol-native decentralized exchange built into the XRP Ledger, supporting order-book offers, cross-currency payments, autobridging, and automated market maker pools directly at the ledger layer.
entity.notes: HEI models the protocol-native XRP Ledger DEX, central limit order books, autobridging, path-based exchange, and AMM functionality as one exchange entity. Individual wallets and frontends using XRPL liquidity are not automatically separate entities.

evidence.title: XRP Ledger decentralized exchange documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes the XRP Ledger's built-in decentralized exchange, order books, Offers, cross-currency payments, and autobridging.

evidence.title: XRP Ledger DEX protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol metrics report current XRP Ledger DEX volume and liquidity activity, corroborating active operation.
